zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Mede於大約1387年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Thomas A Meade27歲，母親Agnes Wycliff29歲。他於1409年與Margaret在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1452年在英國英格蘭布里斯托被列為sheriff of bristol。他去世於1455年在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Mede于大约1387年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Thomas A Meade27岁，母亲Agnes Wycliff29岁。他于1409年与Margaret在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1452年在英国英格兰布里斯托被列为sheriff of bristol。他去世于1455年在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Bartolo, Croce, Dante, Domenico, Giorgio, Luigi, Pietro, Salvatore, Vincenzo, Vito.  French/Haitian Guerline, Jean Marie.
Italian: from the female personal name Fede, from Latin fides ‘faith’.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name   Federico  .

variants.name: Federico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Antonio, Guerino, Armando, Salvatore, Domenico, Gino, Mario, Nino, Sal, Carmine, Guido, Alfredo, Angelo, Benito, Carmela.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Rosario, Enrique, Francisco, Juan.
Italian: from the personal name Federico, of ancient Germanic origin (see Friedrich ). Compare Federick and Frederico .

variants.name: Di Fede
meanings: Italian (Sicily): patronymic or metronymic from the male or female personal name   Fede  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Mede was born about 1387, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas A Meade, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Wycliff, was 29. He married Margaret in 1409, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1452, his occupation is listed as sheriff of bristol in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1455, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Mede est né environ 1387, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas A Meade, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wycliff, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1409, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1452, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of bristol à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1455, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Mede um 1387 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas A Meade 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Wycliff 29. Er hat 1409 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1452 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of bristol in Bristol, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1455 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Mede è nato il circa 1387 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas A Meade, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wycliff, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1409, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1452, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of bristol nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1455, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Medeが約1387年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas A Meadeは27歳，母Agnes Wycliffは29歳であった。1409年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1452年，イギリスイギリスブリストルでの職業はsheriff of bristolと記録されている。彼は1455年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Mede(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas A Meade(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wycliff(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1452년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 sheriff of bristol이었다. 그는 1455년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Mede nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas A Meade, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wycliff, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret em 1409, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1452, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of bristol em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1455, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Mede родился около 1387 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas A Meade было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wycliff, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1409 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1452 году он работал по профессии sheriff of bristol в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1455 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.from 1452 to 1453: mai le 1452 e o'o I le 1453

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Mede nació aproximadamente 1387, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas A Meade, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Wycliff, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret en 1409, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1452, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of bristol en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1455, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
